code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut in_word = false
  mut first = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
        in_word = false
      else
        if not in_word
          if not string.is_empty(result)
            result = "#{result} "
          end
          in_word = true
          first = true
        end
        let out_byte = if first and b >= 97 and b <= 122
          b - 32
        else
          b
        end
        result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(out_byte)}"
        first = false
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
when None
  println("")
end
